text: So guys, now we will make a small version of our big MP3 so that we can process it well. And after that I will tell you how you can chunk it. So here I simply did a Google search. I wrote extract first 10 seconds from MP3 FFMPEG. I got this command. Which takes an input MP3 and writes its initial 10 seconds in the output MP3. So I ran this command. And after running this command, I got a sample.mp3 which is only 10 seconds. Why did I take 10 seconds of MP3? So that 10 seconds of MP3 will be processed quickly. And I will show you how to process it.
